creator: martin.jakob@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 196958
copied and edited INDEX.fonts file

Playing around with the vidfont tool, i saw, that there is no INDEX.fonts file in /usr/share/vt/fonts. This file delivers some additional information in the vidfont interface.

So i copied the file from /usr/share/syscons/fonts/ and edited it, to match the existing fonts in /usr/share/vt/fonts. In my tests this worked for english and german. The other languages are copied and might not be correct.
